Carolei Waynwood

  • A Storm of Swords (appendix)
  • A Feast for Crows (appendix)

Carolei Waynwood is a noblewoman of House Waynwood and the widow of Ser Geremy Frey. They have two children: Sandor Frey, a squire to Ser Donnel Waynwood, and Cynthea Frey, a ward of Lady Anya Waynwood.[1]

Family[ ]

It is unknown how Carolei is related to the other known Waynwoods.
